mapper.insert: insert into "h_churn_result" (username, churn_rate, top1_reason, top2_reason, top3_reason, churn_date) values (#{username}, #{churnRate}, #{top1Reason}, #{top2Reason}, #{top3Reason}, CURRENT_DATE)
mapper.select: select r.result_id as resultId, r.username, r.churn_rate as churnRate, r.top1_reason as top1Reason, r.top2_reason as top2Reason, r.top3_reason as top3Reason, r.churn_date as churnDate from "h_churn_result" r join "h_model_data" m on r.username = m.username where m.model_id = #{dataId} order by r.churn_date desc nulls last, r.result_id desc limit 1

select r.result_id as resultId, r.username, r.churn_rate as churnRate, r.top1_reason as top1Reason, r.top2_reason as top2Reason, r.top3_reason as top3Reason, r.churn_date as churnDate from ( select distinct on (username) result_id, username, churn_rate, top1_reason, top2_reason, top3_reason, churn_date from "h_churn_result" order by username, churn_date desc nulls last, result_id desc ) r
join "h_member" mem ON r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId}

choose.when: select to_char(d.churn_date, 'YYYY-MM') as period, cast(round(avg(d.total)) as int) as totalMembers, cast(round(avg(d.risk)) as int) as riskMembers, avg(d.avg_rate) as avgChurnRate from ( select r.churn_date, count(*) as total, count(*) filter (where r.churn_rate >= 0.45) as risk, avg(r.churn_rate) as avg_rate from "h_churn_result" r join "h_member" mem on r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and r.churn_date is not null group by r.churn_date ) d group by to_char(d.churn_date, 'YYYY-MM') order by period desc
choose.otherwise: select to_char(r.churn_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as period, count(*) as totalMembers, count(*) filter (where r.churn_rate >= 0.45) as riskMembers, avg(r.churn_rate) as avgChurnRate from "h_churn_result" r join "h_member" mem on r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and r.churn_date is not null and to_char(r.churn_date, 'YYYY-MM') = ( select to_char(max(r2.churn_date), 'YYYY-MM') from "h_churn_result" r2 join "h_member" m2 on r2.username = m2.username where m2.gym_id = #{gymId} and r2.churn_date is not null ) group by r.churn_date order by r.churn_date desc

choose.when: with daily_risk as ( select r.churn_date, r.username, r.top1_reason, r.top2_reason, r.top3_reason from "h_churn_result" r join "h_member" mem on r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and r.churn_date is not null and to_char(r.churn_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{period} and r.churn_rate >= 0.45 ), daily_tot as ( select churn_date, count(*) as risk_members from daily_risk group by churn_date ), daily_factor as ( select dr.churn_date, f.stat_key, count(*) as member_count from daily_risk dr cross join unnest(array[dr.top1_reason, dr.top2_reason, dr.top3_reason]) as f(stat_key) where f.stat_key is not null group by dr.churn_date, f.stat_key ) select 'factor' as statType, df.stat_key as statKey, cast(sum(df.member_count) as int) as memberCount, round(avg(df.member_count * 100.0 / nullif(dt.risk_members,0)), 1) as pct from daily_factor df join daily_tot dt on df.churn_date = dt.churn_date group by df.stat_key order by pct desc
choose.otherwise: with risk as ( select r.top1_reason, r.top2_reason, r.top3_reason from "h_churn_result" r join "h_member" mem on r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and r.churn_date = cast(#{period} as date) and r.churn_rate >= 0.45 ), tot as (select count(*) as risk_members from risk) select 'factor' as statType, f.stat_key as statKey, cast(count(*) as int) as memberCount, round(count(*) * 100.0 / nullif((select risk_members from tot),0), 1) as pct from risk cross join unnest(array[risk.top1_reason, risk.top2_reason, risk.top3_reason]) as f(stat_key) where f.stat_key is not null group by f.stat_key order by pct desc

choose.when: select r.username as username, mem.name as name, max(r.churn_rate) as churnRate from "h_churn_result" r join "h_member" mem on r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and r.churn_date is not null and to_char(r.churn_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{period} and r.churn_rate >= 0.45 and #{statKey} in (r.top1_reason, r.top2_reason, r.top3_reason) group by r.username, mem.name order by churnRate desc
choose.otherwise: select r.username as username, mem.name as name, r.churn_rate as churnRate from "h_churn_result" r join "h_member" mem on r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and r.churn_date = cast(#{period} as date) and r.churn_rate >= 0.45 and #{statKey} in (r.top1_reason, r.top2_reason, r.top3_reason) order by r.churn_rate desc

choose.when: with cur as ( select distinct on (r.username) r.username, mem.name, r.churn_rate, r.top1_reason, r.top2_reason, r.top3_reason from "h_churn_result" r join "h_member" mem on r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and r.churn_date is not null and to_char(r.churn_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{period} and r.churn_rate >= 0.45 order by r.username, r.churn_date desc, r.result_id desc ), prev as ( select distinct r.username from "h_churn_result" r join "h_member" mem on r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and r.churn_date is not null and r.churn_rate >= 0.45 and to_char(r.churn_date, 'YYYY-MM') = ( select max(to_char(r2.churn_date, 'YYYY-MM')) from "h_churn_result" r2 join "h_member" m2 on r2.username = m2.username where m2.gym_id = #{gymId} and r2.churn_date is not null and to_char(r2.churn_date, 'YYYY-MM') < #{period} ) ) select c.username as username, c.name as name, c.churn_rate as churnRate, c.top1_reason as top1Reason, c.top2_reason as top2Reason, c.top3_reason as top3Reason from cur c where c.username not in (select username from prev) order by c.churn_rate desc
choose.otherwise: with cur as ( select r.username, mem.name, r.churn_rate, r.top1_reason, r.top2_reason, r.top3_reason from "h_churn_result" r join "h_member" mem on r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and r.churn_date = cast(#{period} as date) and r.churn_rate >= 0.45 ), prev as ( select distinct r.username from "h_churn_result" r join "h_member" mem on r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and r.churn_rate >= 0.45 and r.churn_date = ( select max(r2.churn_date) from "h_churn_result" r2 join "h_member" m2 on r2.username = m2.username where m2.gym_id = #{gymId} and r2.churn_date < cast(#{period} as date) ) ) select c.username as username, c.name as name, c.churn_rate as churnRate, c.top1_reason as top1Reason, c.top2_reason as top2Reason, c.top3_reason as top3Reason from cur c where c.username not in (select username from prev) order by c.churn_rate desc

mapper.select: select mem.username as username, mem.name as name, r.churn_rate as churnRate from "h_member" mem join ( select distinct on (username) username, churn_rate from "h_churn_result" order by username, churn_date desc nulls last, result_id desc ) r on mem.username = r.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and lower(mem.role) = 'member' order by r.churn_rate desc

select r.username as username, mem.name as name, r.churn_rate as churnRate from "h_churn_result" r join "h_member" mem on r.username = mem.username where mem.gym_id = #{gymId} and r.churn_date = (select max(churn_date) from "h_churn_result" where churn_date is not null) and r.churn_rate >= 0.45 and #{statKey} in (r.top1_reason, r.top2_reason, r.top3_reason) order by r.churn_rate desc
